rationale: This skill orchestrates a draft-test-review-improve loop for skill creation, requiring extensive filesystem IO: reading/writing SKILL.md, evals.json, eval metadata, grading, benchmarks, and feedback files within a workspace tree. It spawns Python scripts (aggregate_benchmark, generate_review, run_loop, package_skill) and uses cp/kill/nohup/open shell commands. The description optimization step invokes the claude CLI subprocess which calls api.anthropic.com. No explicit deletions are described, though kill terminates the viewer process.
